title: firstrun.complete
description: Mark the first-run wizard as completed. MUST only succeed when the wizard is in_progress, at least one RegisteredSource of kind 'raw' exists, and at least one RegisteredSource of kind 'project' exists (R-Wiz-2). Source registration MUST be performed via source.register.batch before calling this operation (R-Batch, A9). Sets FirstRunState.completed_at and mirrors the completion flag to localStorage. Emits audit event first_run.completed (R-E2). Partial-success from the batch call is handled at the Finish step; this operation is only invoked after all required sources are committed.

completed_at.description: Server-local time the wizard was marked complete.

registered_source_count.description: Total RegisteredSource rows at completion time, included for caller convenience.

wizard.not.in.progress.description: FirstRunState is already completed_at != null. The caller should refresh state rather than re-completing.

required.step.incomplete.description: No RegisteredSource of kind 'raw' exists, or no RegisteredSource of kind 'project' exists. Both are required before completion (R-Wiz-2). The error payload includes which kinds are missing.
